RegLoan Bank — Underwriting Policy & Rate Sheet Document POL-0009 Page 2 of 2 APR Rate Matrix by FICO × LTV (cont.) FICO Band LTV <=80% LTV 81-90% LTV 91-100% LTV 101-110% LTV 111-120% 700-739 10.81% 12.05% 6.84% 4.52% 12.61% 740-779 6.82% 5.55% 7.75% 5.1% 11.6% 780+ 8.18% 12.67% 9.58% 7.95% 5.96% DTI exception — UW
